challenges.name: Detect Tag
challenges.description: Detect and read a 125kHz RFID tag
instructions: Navigate to RFID > Read on your Flipper Zero
Place a 125kHz tag near the Proxmark antenna
The system will verify your read
hints: 125kHz tags need to be very close to the reader
Try rotating the tag if not detected

challenges.name: Clone to T5577
challenges.description: Clone an EM4100 tag to a writable T5577 card
instructions: Step 1: Read the target EM4100 tag
Step 2: Write the ID to a T5577 card
Step 3: Present the cloned card for verification
hints: T5577 is a universal writable card
Make sure to select EM4100 emulation mode on T5577

challenges.name: Simulate EM410x
challenges.description: Use your Flipper to emulate an EM410x tag
instructions: Read or manually add an EM410x tag to your Flipper
Navigate to RFID > Saved > [Your tag] > Emulate
Hold your Flipper near the reader while emulating
hints: Flipper emulation range is limited - get very close
Keep the Flipper steady while emulating
